name: new-keyword-hunter
description: Chrome extension for mining emerging keywords from Google Trends

scripts.dev: plasmo dev && cp -r static/side-panel.* build/chrome-mv3-dev/ && node scripts/fix-manifest.js build/chrome-mv3-dev/manifest.json
scripts.build: plasmo build && cp -r static/side-panel.* build/chrome-mv3-prod/ && node scripts/fix-manifest.js build/chrome-mv3-prod/manifest.json
